---
title: "lookup_media_type"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_media_type()`

Lookup Media Type IDs

## Usage

```r
lookup_media_type(media_type_name)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `media_type_name` | Character vector. Media types or '"*"' for all. |

## Value

An integer vector of IDs.

## Description

Resolves media type labels to internal FlixPatrol IDs.
